# Rox dT, rxdt.dev

> Personal site of Rox dT, featuring agent tools, AI evaluation projects, and
> practical software for AI workloads.

The site is a static, multi-page TypeScript + Vite application. Its primary interactive project is the AI Deployment Calculator, a browser tool that estimates GPU VRAM and hardware requirements for AI workloads.

## Site

- [Rox dT personal site](https://rxdt.dev/): Main site and project overview.

## Projects

- [AI Deployment Calculator](https://vram.rxdt.dev/): Browser-based tool for estimating GPU VRAM and hardware for AI workloads.

## Source code

- [Site repository](https://github.com/rxdt/rxdt.github.io): Source for the rxdt.dev static site.
- [AI Deployment Calculator repository](https://github.com/rxdt/ai_deployment_calculator): Source for the calculator.
